message:
fix: remove dead code warnings in templates.rs and browse.rs

- Add #[allow(dead_code)] to 5 unused template constants in
  src/skill_md/templates.rs (reserved for future SKILL.md generation)
- Remove unused `should_quit` field from SkillBrowser struct in
  src/tui/browse.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
